variable_identity.standardized_name_en: Oxford Acute Severity of Illness Score

immutable_core.semantic_intent: source-supplied ICU first-day OASIS score summary
immutable_core.semantic_definition: An ICU-stay-level OASIS summary asset preserving the source-supplied total score, official hospital mortality probability, first-day ICU score window, and same-row official component subscores.
immutable_core.same_name_cross_database_rule: Any database asset published as std_oasis must preserve OASIS score summary semantics, a governed first-day ICU score window, component traceability, and score value meaning; it must not silently change into raw labs, raw vitals, mortality phenotype, SOFA, SAPSII, or sepsis onset.

score_phenotype_contract.time_basis_rule: retain the approved source OASIS first ICU-day score window with explicit score_window_start, score_window_end, and score_window_hours
score_phenotype_contract.component_trace_rule: retain same-row official OASIS component subscores and hospital mortality probability when source supplied
score_phenotype_contract.score_value_rule: use std_oasis_total as the primary standardized score value in score_points
score_phenotype_contract.no_row_interpretation: no retained OASIS row means no approved source-supplied OASIS row under this mapping, not proof of low severity or mortality probability

execution_governance.formal_output_rule: Formal std_oasis outputs should go through execution.py reading this variable_spec and an approved mapping_spec.
